message:
⚡ Add React.memo to 5 chart card components + useMemo for TopPods max calcs (#10660)

Wrap 5 expensive chart card exports in React.memo to prevent
unnecessary re-renders when parent state changes:
- TopPods, ResourceTrend, ClusterMetrics, ResourceUsage, ClusterCosts

Additionally, memoize TopPods max value calculations (maxRestarts,
maxCpu, maxMemory, maxGpu) with useMemo to avoid 4 redundant
.map() passes on every render.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
